reviewEntries.sourceRole: Primary numeric metric value in Activity and MetricCard evidence.
evidenceRequired: Existing captured Summary Dashboard source evidence must identify the text role.
The planned token must match the role defined in the typography raw-value extraction plan.
Future source read must remain constrained to typography fields only.
Future values must be recorded in this review matrix before any semantic token file update.
Reviewer must confirm the value is transferable role evidence, not source-specific polish.
rejectionCriteria: The source role cannot be matched to the planned semantic token.
The value requires reading additional Figma nodes outside the approved scope.
The value comes from local runtime CSS or Storybook implementation instead of source evidence.
The extraction includes blocked fields such as color, spacing, layout geometry, radius, or CSS variables.
The value is written directly to tokens/semantic.tokens.json before review acceptance.
The token would be accepted, promoted, or connected to CSS during review-matrix preparation.
The value cannot be separated from decorative Activity color or progress styling.

sourceReadEvidence.evidenceNotes: Primary numeric value observed in mapped Stats node. Secondary numeric values use a smaller size and remain evidence for hierarchy, not a separate semantic token write.

splitDecision.reason: Duration and date are both source-backed record metadata roles, but the observed metadata evidence shows different font sizes, so one shared typography.record.metadata token is too broad for safe semantic token update planning.

reviewEntries.semanticTokenUpdateBlockReason: Old metadata token is split-required and retained only until cleanup or migration planning.
